description: Build a Cathie Wood cognitive framework skill following the Buffett/Abel structure. Cathie Wood is founder and CEO of ARK Invest, known for concentrated bets on disruptive technology.
notes: Leo要求：1.先完善references 2.再编写SKILL.md 3.所有搜索用英文 4.所有文档用英文 5.长文档附链接 6.等待确认后每执行一个任务

styleGuide.quotes: Always use original English quotes, never translate
styleGuide.sources: Cite original English sources with URLs
styleGuide.skil_mdNote: SKILL.md should be concise, reference detailed content in references/ files

tasks.title: Wikipedia - Cathie Wood Full Biography
tasks.description: Extract full Wikipedia article on Cathie Wood for accurate biographical data
tasks.successCriteria: Complete birth date, education, career timeline, Ark founding
tasks.note: Use full content, extract all facts

tasks.title: ARK Invest Official - Cathie Wood Bio
tasks.description: ARK Invest's official page on Cathie Wood
tasks.successCriteria: Official biography, investment focus, company details

tasks.title: Forbes / Bloomberg Profile
tasks.description: Major media profile of Cathie Wood
tasks.searchQuery: Forbes Bloomberg Cathie Wood profile interview
tasks.successCriteria: Full profile content, quotes, career details

tasks.title: CNBC - Cathie Wood Interviews
tasks.description: CNBC coverage and interviews with Cathie Wood
tasks.successCriteria: Recent interviews, investment thesis, market views

tasks.title: Investment Philosophy - Big Ideas
tasks.description: Cathie Wood's documented investment philosophy and thesis
tasks.searchQuery: Cathie Wood investment philosophy disruptive innovation thesis Big Ideas
tasks.successCriteria: Innovation thesis, 5-year investment horizon, concentrated bets

tasks.title: Tesla Investment - ARK's Biggest Bet
tasks.searchQuery: ARK Invest Tesla investment thesis Cathie Wood
tasks.successCriteria: When ARK bought, thesis, results, current position

tasks.title: Other Key Investments - Bitcoin, CRISPR, etc
tasks.description: ARK's major positions and investment thesis
tasks.searchQuery: ARK Invest biggest holdings Bitcoin CRISPR genetic editing Tesla
tasks.successCriteria: Investment cases, thesis for each major holding

tasks.title: ARK ETF Performance History
tasks.description: Performance of ARK funds under Cathie Wood
tasks.searchQuery: ARK ETF performance ARKK ARKG returns 2020 2021 2022 2023 2024

tasks.title: Communication Style Analysis
tasks.description: How Cathie Wood speaks - Twitter, interviews, presentations
tasks.searchQuery: Cathie Wood Twitter communication style interview

tasks.title: External Criticism & Defense
tasks.description: Criticisms of Cathie Wood and her responses
tasks.searchQuery: Cathie Wood criticism bull case bear case ARK Invest
tasks.successCriteria: Main criticisms, market reactions, ARK defense

tasks.title: Write: references/01-writings.md
tasks.description: Cathie Wood's writings, statements, and official communications
tasks.action: Write comprehensive reference with summaries of all collected sources
tasks.successCriteria: All public statements, investment philosophy, sources

tasks.title: Write: references/02-conversations.md
tasks.description: Interviews and conversations featuring Cathie Wood
tasks.action: Write comprehensive reference with interview summaries and quotes
tasks.successCriteria: All interviews summarized with direct quotes and source links

tasks.title: Write: references/03-expression-dna.md
tasks.description: Cathie Wood's communication patterns and expression style
tasks.action: Write comprehensive analysis of Wood's speech patterns
tasks.successCriteria: Complete expression DNA analysis with examples

tasks.title: Write: references/04-external-views.md
tasks.description: External perspectives, criticisms, and analysis of Cathie Wood
tasks.action: Write comprehensive coverage of media and analyst views
tasks.successCriteria: All external views categorized and sourced

tasks.title: Write: references/05-decisions.md
tasks.description: Key investment decisions by Cathie Wood and ARK
tasks.successCriteria: Tesla case study, other major investments, performance analysis

tasks.title: Write: references/06-timeline.md
tasks.description: Complete career and life timeline of Cathie Wood
tasks.action: Write comprehensive timeline based on all research

tasks.title: Create: _meta.json for clawhub
tasks.description: Create _meta.json with version, author, tags for clawhub
tasks.successCriteria: Contains name, version, author, tags, triggers

tasks.title: Write: SKILL.md - Main Skill File
tasks.description: Write final SKILL.md following Anthropic skill specification
tasks.action: Write concise SKILL.md with references to detailed content
tasks.successCriteria: Under 300 lines, follows Anthropic spec, all content in English

executionRule: 每执行一个任务都要等Leo确认后再继续下一个
nextStep: 等待Leo确认后执行Task 1: Wikipedia Biography
